wineries.name: Brave & Maiden Estate
wineries.excerpt: Breathtaking from the moment you pull up to the moment you sadly leave!
wineries.review:
First time visiting and did not disappoint. Facility it self is jaw dropping, every detail is exquisite and gorgeous. The service and tour is worth it but the main event was definitely worth it. Big fans of the wine, very approachable, drink today or lay down for a few years type of wine, Rachel even convinced me to get few magnums. Can't wait to sip them at @kazmicellars!

Some Basics...

Brave & Maiden Estate | Santa Ynez, Santa Barbara
A place where the architecture, views, and glasses all feel considered.
𝐀𝐭𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐩𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞: elegant, intimate, appointment-only without feeling stiff.
𝐒𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞: estate-grown Bordeaux varieties and Syrah with polish and plush texture.
𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐡 𝐬𝐞𝐞𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫: a sit-and-stay-a-while tasting that feels like a modern country house visit.
